title:
PROMPT 015: User Avatar вЂ” Profile Reveal
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1920px (9:16 Vertical)
DURATION: 2.0s | LOOP: No
SVG: User / person icon (3 paths: head circle, shoulder arc body, optional crown detail) вЂ” centered 540Г—820px, 110px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #7C3AED (rich purple)
Avatar circle background: #A855F7 (lighter purple)
Head circle fill: #F3E8FF (very pale lavender)
Body arc fill: #F3E8FF
Verified badge: #3B82F6 (blue circle, white tick, 30px, bottom-right of avatar)
Ring border: #FFFFFF (2px ring around avatar circle)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Circular avatar frame (200px diameter) centered at 540Г—820px.
Person icon inside. Blue verified badge overlaid bottom-right.
Suitable as animated name card for Reels/TikTok profile intro.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.0s total):
0вЂ“0.3s: Purple circle background scales 0 в†’ 1.0 (spring).
0.3вЂ“0.6s: Person icon (head + body) scales 0 в†’ 1.0 inside circle (spring, slight delay).
0.6вЂ“0.8s: White ring border draws clockwise (stroke-dashoffset 100% в†’ 0%, ease-out).
0.8вЂ“1.0s: Verified badge scales 0 в†’ 1.0 at bottom-right (spring).
1.0вЂ“1.3s: Whole avatar group scales 1.0 в†’ 1.08 в†’ 1.0 (confidence pulse).
1.3вЂ“2.0s: Hold. Ring has subtle shimmer (white highlight rotates around ring, opacity 0 в†’ 0.5 в†’ 0, 1 revolution, 0.7s).

EASING CURVES:
- Pop-ins: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Ring draw: ease-out
- Shimmer: ease-in-out
